references.role: painted finish, square portrait scale, breathing room, and runtime oval-crop safety reference only
painted finish, expressive face treatment, and runtime oval-crop safety reference only

conversion.accepted_png: The native output already matched the 1254x1254 card contract and was copied byte-for-byte.
conversion.note: No crop or resize was required before the shipping encode.

visual_inspection.source: Accepted: original adult mythic witch portrait with warm confidence, dark wavy hair, sea-green and plum robes, restrained aged-gold botanical detail, atmospheric indigo/olive field, no animal, victim, wand, text, frame, or adaptation likeness, and sufficient oval-crop breathing room.
visual_inspection.shipping: Accepted at 1254x1254: WebP retains the source composition, facial readability, traditional painted texture, crop safety, and textless frameless edges without a visible conversion defect.
